headline: Wolfe Research Weighs on West Pharmaceutical Services Inc (WST) Stock
summary: West Pharmaceutical Services Inc (NYSE:WST) is one of the best stocks to buy according to billionaire Bill Gates. WST stock is up around 14% year-to-date and has gained nearly 50% over the past year. Analysts still see upside potential in the stock. On May 31, Wolfe Research initiated coverage of West Pharmaceutical Services Inc (NYSE:WST) […]

headline: How The West Pharmaceutical Services (WST) Story Is Evolving With Guidance Buybacks And New Leadership
summary: The updated analyst narrative for West Pharmaceutical Services now reflects a fair value estimate of US$352.36 per share, up from US$349.85. This refinement sits alongside fresh company guidance for Q2 2026 net sales, a recent buyback of 1,222,019 shares for US$297.65 million, and an announced leadership transition planned for the second half of 2026. Read on to see how these moving parts fit together and how you can keep track of the evolving story. Wall Street's queuing for one rocket...
